# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Python data processing application. Start from a full Ubuntu base image and install Python, pip, curl, wget, git, vim, and other useful development tools. This gives us flexibility for debugging and running various scripts in production.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:latest

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    vim \
    nano \
    build-essential \
    libssl-dev \
    libffi-dev \
    libpq-dev \
    libmysqlclient-dev \
    libxml2-dev \
    libxslt1-dev \
    libjpeg-dev \
    libpng-dev \
    libfreetype6-dev \
    liblcms2-dev \
    libwebp-dev \
    libtiff5-dev \
    libopenjp2-7-dev \
    libharfbuzz-dev \
    libfribidi-dev \
    libxcb1-dev \
    libx11-dev \
    libxext-dev \
    libxrender-dev \
    libxfixes-dev \
    libxi-dev \
    libxrandr-dev \
    libxinerama-dev \
    libxcursor-dev \
    libxss-dev \
    libxt-dev \
    libxpm-dev \
    libxft-dev \
    libxmu-dev \
    libxpm-dev \
    libx11-xcb-dev \
    libxcb-util-dev \
    libxcb-image0-dev \
    libxcb-keysyms1-dev \
    libxcb-randr0-dev \
    libxcb-render-util0-dev \
    libxcb-shape0-dev \
    libxcb-sync-dev \
    libxcb-xfixes0-dev \
    libxcb-xinerama0-dev \
    libxcb-xtest0-dev \
    libxcb-xrm-dev \
    libxcb-xv-dev \
    libxcb-xvmc-dev \
    libxcb-glx0-dev \
    libxcb-dri2-0-dev \
    libxcb-dri3-dev \
    libxcb-present-dev \
    libxcb-randr0-dev \
    libxcb-render0-dev \
    libxcb-shm0-dev \
    libxcb-sync-dev \
    libxcb-xfixes0-dev \
    libxcb-xinerama0-dev \
    libxcb-xtest0-dev \
    libxcb-xrm-dev \
    libxcb-xv-dev \
    libxcb-xvmc-dev \
    libxcb-glx0-dev \
    libxcb-dri2-0-dev \
    libxcb-dri3-dev \
    libxcb-present-dev \
    libxcb-randr0-dev \
    libxcb-render0-dev \
    libxcb-shm0-dev \
    libxcb-sync-dev \
    libxcb-xfixes0-dev \
    libxcb-xinerama0-dev \
    libxcb-xtest0-dev \
    libxcb-xrm-dev \
    libxcb-xv-dev \
    libxcb-xvmc-dev \
    libxcb-glx0-dev \
    libxcb-dri2-0-dev \
    libxcb-dri3-dev \
    libxcb-present-dev \
    libxcb-randr0-dev \
    libxcb-render0-dev \
    libxcb-shm0-dev \
    libxcb-sync-dev \
    libxcb-xfixes0-dev \
    libxcb-xinerama0-dev \
    libxcb-xtest0-dev \
    libxcb-xrm-dev \
    libxcb-xv-dev \
    libxcb-xvmc-dev \
    libxcb-glx0-dev \
    libxcb-dri2-0-dev \
    libxcb-dri3-dev \
    libxcb-present-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN pip3 install --upgrade pip
RUN pip3 install --upgrade setuptools wheel

WORKDIR /app
